name: Shredded Beef, Family Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beef and shred it. Marinate with soy sauce, oyster sauce, and bicarbonate of soda for 10 minutes.
2. Rinse the celery and remove the roots and leaves. Cut into 1-inch sticks.
3. Heat oil in a wok. Stir-fry the beef shreds quickly until the beef turns white. Remove and drain.
4. Save some oil in the wok. Stir-fry chopped ginger and chili for a few seconds.
5. Add celery and stir-fry until it is half cooked.
6. Add shredded beef, Chili Nam Yuey, soy sauce, and salt. Mix well.
7. Add wine, sesame oil, and vinegar. Stir-fry.
8. Remove from heat, season with freshly ground black pepper, and serve.
